title: Structure Studio Run Workspace Topology
forbids: Run in Game request workspace ownership drifting out of the Studio server operation runtime
why: Packet 7 makes the generation manifest a private request-workspace input before later packets add generated mod, deployment, observation, and attribution records.
remediate: Keep Run in Game request-workspace path, manifest, artifact id, and correlation helpers under packages/studio-server/src/operationRuntime/runWorkspace.
message: Studio Run in Game workspace topology drifted.
